chapters.title: Introduction & Symbols
chapters.notes: Front matter with the three core rules (down-stroke when going to higher string; up-stroke when going to lower; alternate when on one string) + The Right Hand technique + Symbols key + closing remarks. Load-bearing for the whole book.

chapters.title: The Strokes
chapters.notes: Book pp 1-4. Stroke taxonomy and the exercise series for down-up, up-down, in-between strokes.

chapters.title: Consecutive Strokes
chapters.notes: Book pp 5-8. Consecutive down-strokes and consecutive up-strokes on adjacent strings.

chapters.title: The Major Scales
chapters.notes: Book pp 9-14. Major-scale fingerings with picking patterns applying the three core rules.

chapters.title: Arpeggios
chapters.notes: Book pp 15-25. Largest chapter. Arpeggio fingerings + picking applied across chord shapes.

chapters.title: String Skipping
chapters.notes: Book pp 26-30. Patterns that skip strings — the most demanding application of the three core rules.

chapters.title: Typical Be-Bop Phrases
chapters.notes: Book pp 31-37. Bebop vocabulary with Bruno's picking applied — Charlie Parker / Coltrane-influenced phrases.

chapters.title: Articulations
chapters.notes: Book pp 38-42. Slurs, hammer-ons, pull-offs interacting with the picking rules.

chapters.title: Breaking the Rules
chapters.notes: Book pp 43-?? Bruno's explicit treatment of when to depart from the three core rules.
